title: telanthophora grandifolia var. serraquitchensis
side_effects: Telanthophora grandifolia var. serraquitchensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate, particularly when consumed in large quantities or without proper medical supervision. Some users may experience diarrhea, nausea, and vomiting, while others may suffer from skin irritation, itching, or respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of this plant may lead to seizures, tremors, or even cardiovascular collapse. It is essential to consult with a qualified healthcare professional before using Telanthophora grandifolia var. serraquitchensis for any health-related purposes.
